holdings.infoBox: PRMR is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 4.80%, Advanced Micro Devices at 4.42%, Palo Alto Networks at 3.19%, CrowdStrike Holdings at 2.92%, and KLA Corporation at 2.72%.

overview.description: The PeakShares RMR Prime Equity ETF (PRMR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is a fund-of-funds that seeks capital appreciation and income generation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of US large-cap equities. The funds investment process combines macroeconomic and sector research with bottom-up company analysis. PRMR was launched on Dec 8, 2025 and is issued by PeakShares.
